text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Switching to rest mode. Resuming training once
fully recharged.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This is Mihono Bourbon patrolling the skies. Giant
robot rampaging through town sighted. Engaging.

text_block_list.name: Giant Robot
text_block_list.text: ROOOOARGH! DAUUUGHTER!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...!
Voice pattern confirmed... It bears a strong
resemblance to my father's. How can this be?

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Robo-Father (?)
text_block_list.text: ZRRRT... I WILL FLATTEN THIS CITY AND CONSTRUCT A SPACIOUS TRAINING FIELD!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I request that you halt, Robo-Father. The
flattening of this city would cause great distress
to everyone who resides here.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Robo-Father (?)
text_block_list.text:
DAUGHTER! I AM WORRIED! ARE YOU TRULY
IN AN ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN
DEVELOP?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Personality inconsistent with my true father.
Rampage identified as the result of an error in the
robot's programming.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, Father.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: You taught me the importance of hard work.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: And my trainer believes in my ability to grow.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will become stronger here. Have faith in us and
just watch.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Robo-Father (?)
text_block_list.text:
IS THAT SO? I'M GLAD TO HEAR THAT. ALSO,
DON'T FORGET TO CALL US ONCE IN A WHILE,
OKAY?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Understood.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Robo-Father
text_block_list.text:
NO, YOU DON'T NEED TO UNDERSTAND. I AM
SPEAKING TO THE REAL BOURBON WITHIN
YOU.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Another me?
Beep, kzzzt... Deploying cockpit monitor.

text_block_list.name: Real Mihono Bourbon (?)
text_block_list.text:
Ta-daaah... Hello, there. I'm the one who pilots
Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Real Mihono Bourbon (?)
text_block_list.text: It's already nighttime. You better wake up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: P-pilot? Is there someone controlling me?

Caught up in the events of her dream, Bourbon
doesn't get much rest.
